EXAMPLE: How to add custom vehicle images

Let's say you have a custom vehicle with spawn code "lamborghini"

1. Find/create an image of the Lamborghini
2. Rename it to: lamborghini.png (or .jpg or .webp)
3. Place it in this folder (html/vehicles/)
4. Restart lunar_garage resource

Your folder should look like:
html/vehicles/
├── lamborghini.png  ← Your image here!
├── README.md
└── QUICK_START.md

The garage will now show your custom Lamborghini image!

---

MULTIPLE VEHICLES EXAMPLE:

html/vehicles/
├── lamborghini.png
├── bmwm5.jpg
├── ferrarif40.webp
├── customcar1.png
├── customcar2.png
└── mycustomvehicle.jpg

Each filename MUST match the spawn code exactly!
